title: Exact move count of the Tower of Hanoi
statement_informal: Solving the Tower of Hanoi for n disks takes exactly 2^n - 1 moves.

cost_model.notes: moves(n) = 2*moves(n-1)+1; stated division/subtraction-free as moves n + 1 = 2^n.

references: Classic; an exact closed form (a = b, not a bound).
